Sau nhi87
9u cu87kc tranh lu86{n, ng95pi 96e95s 96ei 96e8691n k8691t lu86{n,
records.m_Talk_DEU: Nach langen 95nberlegungen bist du zum Schluss gekommen,
records.m_Talk_FRA: Apr958s un long moment de r959flexion et de nombreuses d959lib959rations,

records.m_Talk_ENG: that this employee, whom you'd been giving a lot of thought to, was absolutely necessary for the future ahead.
records.m_Talk_VTN: v87mi s87 suy x959t k8785 c95png, ng98~87oi nh95rn vi95xn n95py l95p ho95pn to95pn c86wn thi8691t cho t98~98qng lai ph95{a tr98~87mc c87wa ng95pi.
records.m_Talk_DEU: dass diese Mitarbeiterin, 9588ber die du so viel nachgedacht hast, absolut unverzichtbar f9588r die Zukunft des Unternehmens ist.
records.m_Talk_FRA: vous 95xtes arriv959 95p la conclusion que cette employ959e 959tait un 959l959ment vital pour votre entreprise et son futur.

records.m_Talk_ENG: that you'll be with her, no matter the consequences.
records.m_Talk_VTN: r86ng ng95pi s8689 ch87an c9580 86uy, b86ut ch86up h86{u qu86s ra sao.
records.m_Talk_DEU: sie an dich zu binden, egal was auch geschieht.
records.m_Talk_FRA: de rester 95p ses c9580t959s et la soutenir, peu importe les cons959quences.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Having decided that, you called her to your office. She said she'd be here soon.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Also hast du sie in dein B9588ro gerufen. Sie sagte, sie wolle bald da sein.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fort de cette d959cision, vous l'avez convoqu959e dans votre bureau. Elle ne devrait pas tarder.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, you spent another day holed up in your little room, fiddlin' with Machine G.A.P.? You should, like, get out more once in a while.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, you spent another day holed up in your little room, fiddlin' with Machine G.A.P.? You should, like, get out more once in a while.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, you spent another day holed up in your little room, fiddlin' with Machine G.A.P.? You should, like, get out more once in a while.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you actually, like, walk around outside, you're bound to run into trouble sooner or later. And then you'll need someone's help, right? If anythin' happens, I'll save you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you actually, like, walk around outside, you're bound to run into trouble sooner or later. And then you'll need someone's help, right? If anythin' happens, I'll save you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you actually, like, walk around outside, you're bound to run into trouble sooner or later. And then you'll need someone's help, right? If anythin' happens, I'll save you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That way, you can roam around all you want and actually realize who's keepin' you safe. Might even learn to live with a little more gratitude. See? Everybody wins.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That way, you can roam around all you want and actually realize who's keepin' you safe. Might even learn to live with a little more gratitude. See? Everybody wins.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That way, you can roam around all you want and actually realize who's keepin' you safe. Might even learn to live with a little more gratitude. See? Everybody wins.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Why do I want to help you that much? That really somethin' a company boss says to their own employee?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Why do I want to help you that much? That really somethin' a company boss says to their own employee?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Why do I want to help you that much? That really somethin' a company boss says to their own employee?

records.m_Talk_ENG: My master used to say this all the time. Like, people are connected through gratitude. Being thankful feels good for the one who gives it, and the one who receives it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: My master used to say this all the time. Like, people are connected through gratitude. Being thankful feels good for the one who gives it, and the one who receives it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: My master used to say this all the time. Like, people are connected through gratitude. Being thankful feels good for the one who gives it, and the one who receives it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, Mister Administrator... Do you really, like, hate the idea of being connected to me and, like, feelin' good because of it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, Mister Administrator... Do you really, like, hate the idea of being connected to me and, like, feelin' good because of it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, Mister Administrator... Do you really, like, hate the idea of being connected to me and, like, feelin' good because of it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wait. Now that I said it out loud, that sounded, like, kinda weird. Just pretend, like, you didn't hear that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wait. Now that I said it out loud, that sounded, like, kinda weird. Just pretend, like, you didn't hear that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wait. Now that I said it out loud, that sounded, like, kinda weird. Just pretend, like, you didn't hear that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: H-hey, what's that reaction?! I didn't confess anythin'! Why do you look like you're tryin' to decide whether to reject me or not?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: H-hey, what's that reaction?! I didn't confess anythin'! Why do you look like you're tryin' to decide whether to reject me or not?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: H-hey, what's that reaction?! I didn't confess anythin'! Why do you look like you're tryin' to decide whether to reject me or not?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's a misunderstanding! I never said anythin' like that! Forget it! Who are you calling a pervert?! Drop dead! Idiot!
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's a misunderstanding! I never said anythin' like that! Forget it! Who are you calling a pervert?! Drop dead! Idiot!
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's a misunderstanding! I never said anythin' like that! Forget it! Who are you calling a pervert?! Drop dead! Idiot!
